Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2D12 "SUBSONIC-2D12" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Subsonic.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $2E18. However, before you can actually dump after hitting this breakpoint, you must first set the program counter to $2D77 and execute the code from $2D77 until you return from the JSR $3BF7 at $2D8B. This is important as this subroutine swaps the data in display memory, placing the sprite data in the correct starting position for the entry point at $2D12.
